description: Add excludePatterns to the Jira plugin to prevent its adapter from being injected into Confluence tabs (which share the *.atlassian.net domain). Jira's broad *://*.atlassian.net/* pattern is a superset of Confluence's *://*.atlassian.net/wiki/* — without excludePatterns, both adapters get injected into every Confluence tab.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/jira && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add excludePatterns to Jira plugin to exclude Confluence URLs
userStories.description: Add excludePatterns: ['*://*.atlassian.net/wiki/*'] to both the Jira plugin class and package.json opentabs field. This prevents the Jira adapter from being injected into Confluence tabs.
acceptanceCriteria: JiraPlugin class has readonly excludePatterns = ['*://*.atlassian.net/wiki/*'] after urlPatterns
urlPatterns in both class and package.json remain unchanged as ['*://*.atlassian.net/*']
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/jira/src/index.ts (add excludePatterns property to JiraPlugin class)
- plugins/jira/package.json (add excludePatterns to opentabs field)

Context:
The JiraPlugin class (src/index.ts:25-64) currently has:
```typescript
class JiraPlugin extends OpenTabsPlugin {
  readonly name = 'jira';
  readonly description = 'OpenTabs plugin for Jira';
  override readonly displayName = 'Jira';
  readonly urlPatterns = ['*://*.atlassian.net/*'];
  readonly tools: ToolDefinition[] = [
```

The package.json opentabs field (package.json:13-19) currently has:
```json
"opentabs": {
  "displayName": "Jira",
  "description": "OpenTabs plugin for Jira",
  "urlPatterns": [
    "*://*.atlassian.net/*"
  ]
}
```

Changes:
1. In src/index.ts, add after `readonly urlPatterns = ['*://*.atlassian.net/*'];` (line 29):
```typescript
  readonly excludePatterns = ['*://*.atlassian.net/wiki/*'];
```

2. In package.json, add after the urlPatterns array in the opentabs field:
```json
"excludePatterns": [
  "*://*.atlassian.net/wiki/*"
]
```

Constraints:
- Do NOT change urlPatterns.
- Do NOT add homepage — Jira requires a customer-specific subdomain (mycompany.atlassian.net) so no single canonical URL works.
- The excludePatterns field is optional in the SDK (OpenTabsPlugin.excludePatterns?: string[]), so this is a non-breaking addition.
- Both class and package.json must declare the same excludePatterns (the build tool validates consistency).
